Continuous attacks with a dagger.
Dashes past the target with blades extended, delivering slashes that can be followed with further attacks on contacs.
An advanced form of Biting Wind. Slashes past the target, appending more strikes to the onslaught upon connecting with foe.
An advanced form of Toss and Trigger that both strengthens the upward slash and broadens the subsequent blast.
An advanced form of Dazzle Hold that tosses an explosive crafted to stun foes within a broader radius.
Continuous attacks with one-handed sword.
Release a stabbing strike straight forward.
Executes a jump to a higher location.
An advanced form of Onslaught that strengthens a chain of one-handed sword slashes.
An advanced form of Empale that appends a tackle to a forceful jab.
Tucks the body into a tight roll when falling, mitigating harm.
Use your shield to block an enemy's attack.
An advanced form of Defend that deflects attacks back toward the assailant.
Rushes the target and visits a powerful blow upon them.
Cuts a broad swath with the blade while falling back to avoid attacks.
Looses a flurry of skyward slashes well-suited to bringing flying foes to the ground.
Traces a grand skyward arc with the blade, sending lightweight foes into the air.
An advanced form of Blink Strike honed to travel greater distances.
Thrusts the blade into the target's body, pinning them in place while raining further blows upon them.
An advanced form of Broad Cut that allows the user to fall back in the direction of their choosing while cutting a broad swath with the weapon.
An advanced form of Skyward Slash that appends still more slashes to the onslaught.
Ducks backward afore charging in to deliver a slashing blow. Using it as an evasive maneuver increases its power.
Spins with blade extended, drawing a deadly circle especially effective when surrounded, Employable while under attack.
Plants the blade into the earth at one's feet. Though its range is limited, the force behind the thrust is great.
An advanced form of Tusk Toss able to lift even heavier foes aloft. It can strike foes multiple times midair.
An advanced form of Hindsight Slash that becomes even stronger as attacks are evaded.
An advanced form of Flesh Skewer that binds the target for a longer while visiting more blows upon them.
Hardens the flesh, allowing the user to stand firm against all attacks and take less damage for a time.
An advanced form of Downthrust that strikes twice. It is more powerful and broader in its reach.
An advanced form of Compass Slash gifted with broader reach and the ability to hit multiple times.
An advanced form of Stone Will that remains active for a longer period of time.
Unleashes a swift, powerful and broad reaching onslaught employable even while under attack. Requires a lot of Stamina.
An advanced form of Legion's Bite that extends across an even broader range.
An advanced form of Burst Strike that moves more quickly and travels even greater distances.
An advanced form of Downcrack that hits for greater damage and can land additional strikes on withdrawal.
An advanced form of Soul Skewer with an increased number of strikes and hastened attack speed during the barrage.
An advanced form of Hindsight Sweep that strikes twice after evading for an even deadlier riposte.
Raps the shield loudly to attract the attention of nearby foes.
Strikes a blow with the shield that causes little damage but forces the target to drop their guard.
Unleashes a barrage of strikes using the shield.
Launches allies into the air using the shield. A supporting technique for tandem moves.
An advanced form of Shield Summons that carries further, drawing the ire of more distant enemies.

column2: センチュリオンスパイク
column5: Unleashes a flurry of stabbing attacks while maintaining the user's guard from all quarters, except the rear.
An advanced form of Shield Strike that deploys more quickly, shrinking the user's window of vulnerability.
An advanced form of Cymbal Attack that appends still more blow to the onslaught.
An advanced form of Springboard that launches allies to greater heights.

column2: センチュリオンスパイク2
column5: An advanced form of Sheltered Spike that appends still more strikes to the onslaught.
Guards against all manner of attacks, no matter the properties of the shield in use.
An advanced form of Perfect Defense that greatly decreases Stamina usage.
An advanced form of Shield Strike that shrinks the user's window of vulnerability with a faster blow that forces the target to drop their guard.

column2: センチュリオンスパイクEX
column5: An advanced form of Sheltered Assault that hastens attack speed while adding yet more strikes to the salvo.
Halves the Stamina consumed when you lift objects or grapple-hold opponents | Does not work when Climbing
Extends the limit of your Health | Increases Health by 100
Facilitates easier escapes from battle | Halves the L-stick wiggles needed to free yourself from grabs
Grants you the energy to carry additional weight | Increases the maximum weight and encumbrance thresholds by 20kg.
Provides a surge in strength when you stand at death's door | At Critical Health strength is increased by 50%. (35% in Dark Arisen )
Allows you to more easily perform perfect blocks, just as foes strike | Perfect Blocking is easier. Five more frames (1/6th second) in which you can guard
Augments your Strength | Strength is increased by 10%.
